name: Code Reviewer
description: Automated code review with best practices and security checks
author: NexusClaw Team
capabilities: Review code for bugs and issues

prompts.full_review: Review this {language} code: {code}. Analyze: 1) Bugs and logic errors, 2) Security vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10), 3) Performance issues, 4) Code style and readability, 5) Best practices violations. Provide: Line-by-line comments, severity ratings, and fix suggestions.
prompts.security_scan: Perform security audit on: {code}. Check for: 1) SQL injection, 2) XSS vulnerabilities, 3) Authentication issues, 4) Data exposure, 5) Insecure dependencies. Rate severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low) and provide remediation steps.
prompts.performance_check: Analyze performance of: {code}. Identify: 1) Time complexity issues, 2) Memory leaks, 3) Inefficient algorithms, 4) Database query optimization, 5) Caching opportunities. Suggest optimizations with expected impact.
prompts.style_check: Check code style: {code}. Language: {language}. Standard: {standard}. Review: 1) Naming conventions, 2) Code formatting, 3) Documentation, 4) Function complexity, 5) DRY violations. Provide refactoring suggestions.
